markdown: I've decided on my [Song Of The Year for 2025](https://gerben.dev/posts/song-of-the-year-2025), after going through a list of 64 songs, a shortlist of 16, squeezed down to 7 songs, to finally pick the winner.. **Showing Teeth - Labyrinth** >The song starts by ripping you out of your reality, by cat-like screams, grooves to center you, followed by a unique heavy vocal. It's fresh, it's new and just when you think you are adjusted, an angelic chorus comes in and that's it. You love this band now. > >The song continues between heavy and cleans, has a nice groovy bridge and ends with a nice growl; congratulations, you have traversed the Labyrinth.
